name: Royal Card Clash
short_description: Defeat the royals in this solitary card game! This game is a total reimagining of classic card games like Solitaire, with just you and a deck of playing cards. You will have to think carefully and play your cards right to achieve victory.
detailed_description:
Royal Card Clash is a total reimagining of classic card games like Solitaire, with just you and a deck of playing cards. Be as efficient as possible to break you enemies. You will have to think carefully and play your cards right to achieve victory.

The number cards serve as your attacks against the royal cards. You win by defeating all the royals before your deck runs out. The game is easy to learn, but hard to master.

Features

  • Simple to learn rules that provide deep decision making
  • Various difficulty levels to unlock
  • Relaxing but catchy chiptune soundscape
  • Performance statistics

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Danish, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America
